title: AI Image AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium travel-planning papercraft map scene for Kyoto. Map: soft beige illustrated Kyoto city map with river and temple districts lies on a warm wooden desk as the main surface. Landmarks: Handcrafted papercraft Kiyomizu-dera, Fushimi Inari torii gates, bamboo grove, Gion lantern street, and tiny matcha tea house rise from approximate positions on the map. Route: A dotted red journey route tells a three-day cultural walk from shrine gates to old town streets, followed by tiny traveler with tan backpack and rolling suitcase. Desk Props: black desk lamp, train ticket, washi tape, pencil, and small ceramic cup, arranged like a cozy travel-planning workspace. Lighting: warm cozy black desk-lamp glow with soft evening shadows, tactile paper shadows, miniature depth, premium editorial photography. Restrictions: Keep location-specific landmarks plausible, no unreadable map clutter, no wrong iconic objects, no messy scale, no random text.
